items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the IDOR scenario, but the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from the simulation of this scenario. Additionally, there is no clear indication of whether the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report was achieved. Without this critical information, it is impossible to assess whether the requirement has been met, leading to a blocked status.
